migrations.title: gptme Model Alias Migration
migrations.description: Move from hardcoded model strings in scripts to reusable provider/model aliases.

steps.title: Alias declaration
steps.description: Create stable aliases to avoid pinning every command to provider/model IDs.
steps.after:
aliases:
  fast: openai/gpt-4o-mini
  quality: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6

# usage
gptme --model fast "summarize this repo"
steps.notes: Alias-based workflows reduce churn during model renames.
